'''Vol Hamame''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who made his living as a thug and was once a member of [[Gizman|Big Gizz's]] [[Gizz's Gang|swoop gang]] before seeking greater profits with [[Phedroi]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After intercepting a message about the survival of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], the pair followed [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]—who at the time was overseeing the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian's]] recuperation—out across the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] in hopes of eliminating the weakened Fett. His end was a grisly one as he and his companion were crushed under the full weight of an automated [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].
